query:
SELECT EXISTS(
                SELECT 1
                FROM l1_batches
                WHERE
                    number > 0
                    AND settlement_layer_type = $1
                    AND settlement_layer_chain_id = $2
                    AND (
                        eth_commit_tx_id IS NULL
                        OR NOT EXISTS (
                            SELECT 1 FROM eth_txs_history
                            WHERE id = l1_batches.eth_commit_tx_id
                                AND finality_status = 'finalized'
                        )
                    )
            )
